lineItems.assumption: One always-on shared-cpu-2x Machine with 2 GiB RAM in Singapore for 30 days.
One 50-GiB Fly Volume at USD 0.15 per provisioned GiB-month.
Twenty-five GiB retained privately, with the first 5 GiB free and 20 GiB billed at USD 0.019 per GiB-month.
A conservative 20 GiB-month of billable incremental snapshots after the first 10 GiB free.
Fifty GiB of Asia-Pacific public egress at USD 0.04 per GiB.
One single-hostname certificate, within the first ten free certificates.
Fly logs, health checks, and built-in metrics only; no paid monitoring service.
